Notice Of Hearing On Verified Petition To Compel Arbitration For Determination Of Fair Market Rent Under Lease
Off Calendar May-12-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER PASEIA, INC. DBA PAOLO SHOES's Petition To Compel Arbitration For Determination Of Fair Market Rent Under Lease is off calendar. A request for dismissal was filed on April 29, 2014. Judge: A. James Robertson II, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
